Scout

AQL's sniffer. It runs automatically every morning (7am MT), searching the web for Wide Effect mentions, LinkedIn presence, and market intel, and files only what it can verify with a named source. Run it manually any time.

No scouted intel yet. Run the scout or wait for the morning sweep.

Brand Guide

The curated layer. Colors, type, voice, and services live here, built from AQL's data sources. Saving publishes the guide into AQL so every builder inherits it instantly.
